name: How to Bridge the Gap Between SEO and AI Engine Optimization
description: How to Bridge the Gap Between SEO and AI Engine Optimization - San Jose

step.name: Step 1
step.text: First, identify the 'trigger' questions that generate AI Overviews in your practice area. Second, write concise, factual lead-ins for your pages. Third, use schema markup to highlight your firm’s credentials. This signals to Google that you are a safe, expert pick for the user. It’s a fast-moving target, so having experts like us in your corner makes a huge difference. Let's get started.
